output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legal demand letter for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no signup needed.
content_outline: The Deposit Dilemma: Why Landlords Think They Can Keep Your Money
Know Your Rights: Illegal Deductions and State Return Timelines
The 60-Second Fix: How a Demand Letter Gets Results (No Lawyer Needed)
key_points: Landlords must return security deposits within a state-mandated window, typically 14 to 60 days after move-out
Normal wear and tear, carpet aging, and minor wall scuffs are not legally valid deductions
Most states require a formal written demand before a tenant can escalate to small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates a state-specific security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee with no signup or subscription
output.cta: Stop waiting. Generate your official deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup. No subscription. Just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated U.S. renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, over-deducting from, or refusing to return their security deposit.
